news.t: My Preferred Ways To Play The Fed Pay 8%+ Dividends
3 Preferred Stock Funds Yielding Up To 9.4%

overview.description: The First Trust Preferred Securities & Income ETF (FPE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that attempts to generate income by investing globally in preferred equities and income producing debt across the market cap spectrum. FPE was launched on Feb 12, 2013 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: My Preferred Ways To Play The Fed Pay 8%+ Dividends
data.text: Bond bargain alert! Three secure funds yielding 8% to 9% are for sale on the discount rack.
